inputs.titre: Saint Louis rentre en France après son séjour en Terre Sainte

reason: The image depicts a man in a medieval-style setting, resembling Saint Louis returning to France. He is wearing a woolen cloak and has a leather belt, which is appropriate for the era. The background shows timber-framed dwellings and a muddy ground, creating the desired atmosphere. There are no visible anachronisms like smartphones or modern clothing. However, the buckle on the leather strap may be slightly too modern in design, bringing the validity down a couple of points. The forest setting and simple banner also align with the description.
